Note: Load this save, then click 'Setup Antz' on the control panel to spawn the full table. Assets are served from a local HTTP server (python3 -m http.server 8000 from the repo root). If 127.0.0.1 does not work, replace it with your LAN IP in scripts/Global.-1.ttslua and re-run: python3 TTS/build_save.py
LuaScript:
state = {
  playerCount = 2,
  chambersPerPlayer = 4,
  round = 1,
}

assetUrls = {
  board = "http://127.0.0.1:8000/TTS/assets/png/board.png",
  playerMat = "http://127.0.0.1:8000/TTS/assets/png/player_mat.png",
  chamberFaceSheet = "http://127.0.0.1:8000/TTS/assets/png/chamber_sheet.png",
  chamberBack = "http://127.0.0.1:8000/TTS/assets/png/chamber_back.png",
  eventFaceSheet = "http://127.0.0.1:8000/TTS/assets/png/event_sheet.png",
  eventBack = "http://127.0.0.1:8000/TTS/assets/png/event_back.png",
}

layout = {
  controlPanel = {
    position = {0, 1.2, -34},
    rotation = {0, 180, 0},
    scale = {2.2, 0.6, 1.4},
  },
  board = {
    position = {0, 1, 0},
    rotation = {0, 180, 0},
    scale = {1.8, 1, 1.2},
  },
  chamberDeck = {
    position = {-55, 2, -18},
    rotation = {0, 180, 180},
    scale = {1.2, 1, 1.2},
  },
  eventDeck = {
    position = {55, 2, -18},
    rotation = {0, 180, 180},
    scale = {1.2, 1, 1.2},
  },
  tokenBags = {
    {
      nickname = "Resource Bag",
      color = "Brown",
      position = {-56, 2, 8},
    },
    {
      nickname = "Worker Bag",
      color = "Green",
      position = {-49, 2, 8},
    },
    {
      nickname = "Threat Bag",
      color = "Red",
      position = {49, 2, 8},
    },
  },
}

spawnedGuids = {}
controlPanelGuid = nil

function onLoad(saved_data)
  loadState(saved_data)
  broadcastToAll("ANTZ TTS prototype loaded. Configure asset URLs at the top of Global if you want Setup Antz to spawn the table automatically.", {0.95, 0.88, 0.67})
  Wait.frames(function()
    spawnControlPanel()
  end, 3)
end

function onSave()
  return JSON.encode({
    state = state,
    spawnedGuids = spawnedGuids,
    controlPanelGuid = controlPanelGuid,
  })
end

function spawnControlPanel()
  local existing = nil

  if controlPanelGuid ~= nil then
    existing = getObjectFromGUID(controlPanelGuid)
  end

  if existing == nil then
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
      if obj.getName() == "Antz Setup Console" then
        existing = obj
        break
      end
    end
  end

  if existing ~= nil then
    controlPanelGuid = existing.getGUID()
    configureControlPanel(existing)
    return
  end

  spawnObject({
    type = "BlockSquare",
    position = layout.controlPanel.position,
    rotation = layout.controlPanel.rotation,
    scale = layout.controlPanel.scale,
    sound = false,
    callback_function = function(obj)
      obj.setName("Antz Setup Console")
      obj.setDescription("Use the buttons on this block to choose player count and spawn the Antz table.")
      obj.setLock(true)
      obj.setColorTint({0.18, 0.15, 0.12})
      controlPanelGuid = obj.getGUID()
      configureControlPanel(obj)
    end,
  })
end

function configureControlPanel(panel)
  if panel == nil then
    return
  end

  panel.clearButtons()

  panel.createButton({
    click_function = "setupAntz",
    function_owner = Global,
    label = "Setup Antz",
    position = {0, 0.32, -0.8},
    rotation = {0, 0, 0},
    width = 1800,
    height = 360,
    font_size = 220,
    color = {0.42, 0.28, 0.17},
    font_color = {1, 0.95, 0.86},
  })

  panel.createButton({
    click_function = "nextRound",
    function_owner = Global,
    label = "Next Round",
    position = {0, 0.32, 0},
    rotation = {0, 0, 0},
    width = 1800,
    height = 320,
    font_size = 200,
    color = {0.29, 0.39, 0.21},
    font_color = {1, 0.95, 0.86},
  })

  panel.createButton({
    click_function = "cyclePlayerCount",
    function_owner = Global,
    label = "Players: " .. tostring(state.playerCount),
    position = {0, 0.32, 0.76},
    rotation = {0, 0, 0},
    width = 1800,
    height = 320,
    font_size = 190,
    color = {0.24, 0.3, 0.42},
    font_color = {1, 0.95, 0.86},
  })
end

function setupAntz()
  local missing = missingAssetKeys()
  if #missing > 0 then
    broadcastToAll("Setup blocked. Replace the placeholder URLs in Global first: " .. table.concat(missing, ", "), {1, 0.55, 0.55})
    return
  end

  clearSpawnedObjects()
  state.round = 1

  spawnBoard()
  spawnPlayerMats()
  spawnDecks()
  spawnBags()

  broadcastToAll("Antz table spawned for " .. tostring(state.playerCount) .. " players with board, colony mats, decks, bags, and snap points.", {0.81, 0.94, 0.79})
end

function nextRound()
  state.round = state.round + 1
  broadcastToAll("Round " .. tostring(state.round) .. ": reveal a threat, resolve route pressure, then build or forage.", {0.85, 0.88, 1})
end

function cyclePlayerCount()
  if state.playerCount >= 4 then
    state.playerCount = 2
  else
    state.playerCount = state.playerCount + 1
  end

  local panel = getObjectFromGUID(controlPanelGuid)
  if panel ~= nil then
    configureControlPanel(panel)
  else
    spawnControlPanel()
  end
  broadcastToAll("Player count set to " .. tostring(state.playerCount) .. ". Press Setup Antz to respawn the table for that layout.", {0.86, 0.92, 1})
end

function missingAssetKeys()
  local missing = {}
  for key, value in pairs(assetUrls) do
    if value == nil or value == "" or string.find(value, "REPLACE_ME", 1, true) ~= nil then
      table.insert(missing, key)
    end
  end
  table.sort(missing)
  return missing
end

function spawnBoard()
  local pos = layout.board.position
  local rot = layout.board.rotation
  local scl = layout.board.scale
  spawnObjectData({
    data = {
      Name = "Custom_Tile",
      Nickname = "Backyard Branch Board",
      Description = "Branching routes from the nest to foraging spaces.",
      Transform = toTransform(pos, rot, scl),
      CustomImage = {
        ImageURL = assetUrls.board,
        ImageSecondaryURL = "",
        ImageScalar = 1,
        CustomTile = {
          Type = 0,
          Thickness = 0.1,
          Stackable = false,
          Stretch = true,
        },
      },
    },
    callback_function = function(obj)
      registerSpawn(obj)
      obj.setLock(true)
      obj.setSnapPoints(boardSnapPoints())
    end,
  })
end

function spawnPlayerMats()
  for _, mat in ipairs(getMatLayout()) do
    spawnObjectData({
      data = {
        Name = "Custom_Tile",
        Nickname = mat.nickname,
        Description = "Player colony tableau and tracks.",
        Transform = toTransform(mat.position, mat.rotation, mat.scale),
        CustomImage = {
          ImageURL = assetUrls.playerMat,
          ImageSecondaryURL = "",
          ImageScalar = 1,
          CustomTile = {
            Type = 0,
            Thickness = 0.1,
            Stackable = false,
            Stretch = true,
          },
        },
      },
      callback_function = function(obj)
        registerSpawn(obj)
        obj.setLock(true)
        obj.setSnapPoints(matSnapPoints(mat.rotation[2]))
      end,
    })
  end
end

function getMatLayout()
  local scale = {1.3, 1, 0.9}

  if state.playerCount == 2 then
    return {
      {
        nickname = "Colony Mat A",
        position = {-35, 1, 22},
        rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        scale = scale,
      },
      {
        nickname = "Colony Mat B",
        position = {35, 1, 22},
        rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        scale = scale,
      },
    }
  end

  if state.playerCount == 3 then
    return {
      {
        nickname = "Colony Mat A",
        position = {-44, 1, 23},
        rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        scale = scale,
      },
      {
        nickname = "Colony Mat B",
        position = {0, 1, 33},
        rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        scale = scale,
      },
      {
        nickname = "Colony Mat C",
        position = {44, 1, 23},
        rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        scale = scale,
      },
    }
  end

  return {
    {
      nickname = "Colony Mat A",
      position = {-44, 1, 28},
      rotation = {0, 180, 0},
      scale = scale,
    },
    {
      nickname = "Colony Mat B",
      position = {44, 1, 28},
      rotation = {0, 180, 0},
      scale = scale,
    },
    {
      nickname = "Colony Mat C",
      position = {-44, 1, -30},
      rotation = {0, 0, 0},
      scale = scale,
    },
    {
      nickname = "Colony Mat D",
      position = {44, 1, -30},
      rotation = {0, 0, 0},
      scale = scale,
    },
  }
end

function spawnDecks()
  spawnObjectData({
    data = {
      Name = "DeckCustom",
      Transform = toTransform(layout.chamberDeck.position, layout.chamberDeck.rotation, layout.chamberDeck.scale),
      Nickname = "Colony Deck",
      Description = "Chamber cards for building the nest.",
      CustomDeck = {
        ["1"] = {
          FaceURL = assetUrls.chamberFaceSheet,
          BackURL = assetUrls.chamberBack,
          NumWidth = 2,
          NumHeight = 2,
          BackIsHidden = true,
          UniqueBack = false,
          Type = 0,
        },
      },
      DeckIDs = {100, 101, 102, 103},
      ContainedObjects = chamberContainedObjects(),
    },
    callback_function = function(obj)
      registerSpawn(obj)
    end,
  })

  spawnObjectData({
    data = {
      Name = "DeckCustom",
      Transform = toTransform(layout.eventDeck.position, layout.eventDeck.rotation, layout.eventDeck.scale),
      Nickname = "Threat Deck",
      Description = "Backyard event cards.",
      CustomDeck = {
        ["2"] = {
          FaceURL = assetUrls.eventFaceSheet,
          BackURL = assetUrls.eventBack,
          NumWidth = 3,
          NumHeight = 2,
          BackIsHidden = true,
          UniqueBack = false,
          Type = 0,
        },
      },
      DeckIDs = {200, 201, 202, 203, 204, 205},
      ContainedObjects = eventContainedObjects(),
    },
    callback_function = function(obj)
      registerSpawn(obj)
    end,
  })
end

function spawnBags()
  for _, bag in ipairs(layout.tokenBags) do
    spawnObject({
      type = "Bag",
      position = bag.position,
      rotation = {0, 180, 0},
      sound = false,
      callback_function = function(obj)
        registerSpawn(obj)
        obj.setName(bag.nickname)
        obj.setDescription("Utility bag for playtest counters and spare pieces.")
        obj.setColorTint(stringColorToRGB(bag.color))
      end,
    })
  end
end

function boardSnapPoints()
  return {
    {position = {0, 0.25, 0}, rotation = {0, 180, 0}, rotation_snap = true},
    {position = {8.4, 0.25, -1.9}, rotation = {0, 180, 0}, rotation_snap = true},
    {position = {13.9, 0.25, -5.1}, rotation = {0, 180, 0}, rotation_snap = true},
    {position = {2.8, 0.25, -12.7}, rotation = {0, 180, 0}, rotation_snap = true},
    {position = {-14.2, 0.25, -5.3}, rotation = {0, 180, 0}, rotation_snap = true},
    {position = {14.5, 0.25, 10.3}, rotation = {0, 180, 0}, rotation_snap = true},
    {position = {-15.4, 0.25, 12.0}, rotation = {0, 180, 0}, rotation_snap = true},
  }
end

function matSnapPoints(yRotation)
  local points = {}
  local startX = -6.6
  local startZ = -6.9
  local spacing = 4.35
  local snapRotation = {0, yRotation or 180, 0}

  for row = 0, 3 do
    for col = 0, 3 do
      table.insert(points, {
        position = {
          startX + (col * spacing),
          0.25,
          startZ + (row * spacing),
        },
        rotation = snapRotation,
        rotation_snap = true,
      })
    end
  end

  local trackZ = {-6.4, -3.85, -1.3, 1.25, 3.8, 6.35, 8.9}
  for _, z in ipairs(trackZ) do
    table.insert(points, {
      position = {7.55, 0.25, z},
      rotation = snapRotation,
      rotation_snap = false,
    })
  end

  return points
end

function clearSpawnedObjects()
  local seen = {}
  for _, guid in ipairs(spawnedGuids) do
    if not seen[guid] then
      seen[guid] = true
      local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
      if obj ~= nil then
        destroyObject(obj)
      end
    end
  end
  spawnedGuids = {}
end

function registerSpawn(obj)
  if obj == nil then
    return
  end

  local guid = obj.getGUID()
  if guid == nil or guid == "" then
    return
  end

  for _, existing in ipairs(spawnedGuids) do
    if existing == guid then
      return
    end
  end

  table.insert(spawnedGuids, guid)
end

function toTransform(position, rotation, scale)
  return {
    posX = position[1],
    posY = position[2],
    posZ = position[3],
    rotX = rotation[1],
    rotY = rotation[2],
    rotZ = rotation[3],
    scaleX = scale[1],
    scaleY = scale[2],
    scaleZ = scale[3],
  }
end

function chamberContainedObjects()
  local customDeck = {
    ["1"] = {
      FaceURL = assetUrls.chamberFaceSheet,
      BackURL = assetUrls.chamberBack,
      NumWidth = 2,
      NumHeight = 2,
      BackIsHidden = true,
      UniqueBack = false,
      Type = 0,
    },
  }
  return {
    cardObject(100, "Food Storage", customDeck),
    cardObject(101, "Nursery", customDeck),
    cardObject(102, "Expansion Chamber", customDeck),
    cardObject(103, "Soldier Post", customDeck),
  }
end

function eventContainedObjects()
  local customDeck = {
    ["2"] = {
      FaceURL = assetUrls.eventFaceSheet,
      BackURL = assetUrls.eventBack,
      NumWidth = 3,
      NumHeight = 2,
      BackIsHidden = true,
      UniqueBack = false,
      Type = 0,
    },
  }
  return {
    cardObject(200, "Rain", customDeck),
    cardObject(201, "Drought", customDeck),
    cardObject(202, "Pesticides", customDeck),
    cardObject(203, "Lawn Mower", customDeck),
    cardObject(204, "Frost", customDeck),
    cardObject(205, "Spider", customDeck),
  }
end

cardGuidCounter = 0

function cardObject(cardId, nickname, customDeck)
  cardGuidCounter = cardGuidCounter + 1
  return {
    GUID = string.format("c%05d", cardGuidCounter),
    Name = "Card",
    Transform = {
      posX = 0,
      posY = 0,
      posZ = 0,
      rotX = 0,
      rotY = 180,
      rotZ = 180,
      scaleX = 1,
      scaleY = 1,
      scaleZ = 1,
    },
    Nickname = nickname,
    Description = "",
    CardID = cardId,
    CustomDeck = customDeck,
    SidewaysCard = false,
  }
end

function loadState(saved_data)
  if saved_data == nil or saved_data == "" then
    return
  end

  local decoded = JSON.decode(saved_data)
  if decoded == nil then
    return
  end

  if decoded.state ~= nil then
    state = decoded.state
  end

  if decoded.spawnedGuids ~= nil then
    spawnedGuids = decoded.spawnedGuids
  end

  if decoded.controlPanelGuid ~= nil then
    controlPanelGuid = decoded.controlPanelGuid
  end
end
